calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-06-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Petitioner: Ronald Sanders present in pro per for the minor: Isiash Edward Isaac, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: Isiash Ray Sanders.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-08-2004 Reset To May-06-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Petitioners: Ronald Sanders present in pro per for the minor: Isiash Edward Isaac, were sworn and examined.
Without proof of proper notice to or contenst by the Minor's mother, the Court continued this matter to May 6, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for Petitioner to obtain an Order dispensing notice.
